public class Solution { private static final int FEBRUARY = 2; public int numberOfDays(int year, int month) { if (month != FEBRUARY && isLeapYear(year)) return getMonthLength(month); if (isFebruary(year)) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid February days: " + month); return -1; // This line should not be reached } private boolean isLeapYear(int year) { return ((year % 4 == 0 && year % 100 != 0) || (year % 400 == 0)); } private int getMonthLength(int month) { switch (month) { case 4: case 6: case 9: case 11: return 30; default: return 31; } } }

public class Solution { private static final int FEBRUARY = 2; public int numberOfDays(int year, int month) throws IllegalArgumentException { if (month != FEBRUARY && isLeapYear(year)) return getMonthLength(month); if (!isLeapYear(year)) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Not a leap year"); return getMonthLength(FEBRUARY); } private boolean isLeapYear(int year) { if (year % 4 == 0 && year % 100 != 0 || year % 400 == 0) return true; return false; } private int getMonthLength(int month) { switch(month){ case 4: case 6: case 9: case 11: return 30; default: return 31; } } }

public class Solution { public int movesToMakeZigzag(int[] nums) { if (nums == null || nums.length < 2) return 0; boolean evenInvalid = false, oddInvalid = false; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length - 1; i++) { int left = Math.min(nums[i], nums[i + 1]); if (nums[i] >= left && !evenInvalid) { evenMoves += nums[i] - left + 1; evenInvalid = true; } } for (int i = 0; i < nums.length - 2; i++) { int right = Math.min(nums[i], nums[i + 1]); if (nums[i] >= right && !oddInvalid) { oddMoves += nums[i] - right + 1; oddInvalid = true; } } return evenInvalid ? evenMoves : oddMoves; } }

public class Solution { public int movesToMakeZigzag(int[] nums) { if (nums == null || nums.length < 2) return 0; boolean evenInvalid = false; boolean oddInvalid = false; for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { int left = i > 0 ? nums[i - 1] : Integer.MAX_VALUE; int right = i < nums.length - 1 ? nums[i + 1] : Integer.MAX_VALUE; if ((i % 2 == 0 && evenInvalid) || (i % 2 != 0 && oddInvalid)) { continue; // Skip invalid states } int minValue = Math.min(left, right); if (nums[i] >= minValue) { if (i % 2 == 0) { evenMoves += nums[i] - minValue + 1; evenInvalid = true; } else { oddMoves += nums[i] - minValue + 1; oddInvalid = true; } } } return Math.min(evenMoves, oddMoves); } }

public class Solution { public int movesToMakeZigzag(int[] nums) { if (nums == null || nums.length < 2) return 0; boolean isEven = false; // Assume the first element starts as even int totalMoves = 0; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { int left = isEven ? Integer.MAX_VALUE : nums[i - 1]; int right = !isEven ? Integer.MAX_VALUE : nums[i + 1]; if (!isValid(nums[i], left, right)) { totalMoves += Math.abs(left) + Math.abs(right); } // Toggle the current state isEven = !isEven; } return totalMoves; } private boolean isValid(int num, int left, int right) { if (num >= Math.min(left, right)) return false; return true; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public String smallestStringWithSwaps(String s, int[][] pairs) { int n = s.length(); int[] p = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { p[i] = i; } // Merge the three loops into a single pass for (int[] pair : pairs) { union(pair[0], pair[1], p); } Map> groups = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { int root = find(i, p); if (!groups.containsKey(root)) { groups.put(root, new PriorityQueue<>()); } groups.get(root).add(s.charAt(i)); } StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { int root = find(i, p); char c = groups.get(root).poll(); sb.append(c); } return sb.toString(); } private void union(int x, int y, int[] p) { if (p[x] != x) { p[x] = find(p[x], p); } if (p[y] != y) { p[y] = find(p[y], p); } if (find(x, p) != find(y, p)) { p[find(y, p)] = find(x, p); } } private int find(int x, int[] p) { if (p[x] != x) { p[x] = find(p[x], p); } return p[x]; } }

public class Solution { public String alphabetBoardPath(String target) { int x = 0, y = 0; StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (char c : target.toCharArray()) { dx = (c - 'a') / 5; dy = (c - 'a') % 5; moveDown(dx); moveLeft(dy); sb.append('!'); } return sb.toString(); } private void moveDown(int steps) { while (x > steps) { x--; sb.append('U'); } } private void moveLeft(int steps) { while (y > steps) { y--; sb.append('L'); } } }

public class Solution { public int minimumMoves(int[] arr) { int[][] dp = new int[arr.length][arr.length]; for (int[] row : dp) Arrays.fill(row, -1); return minRemovals(arr, 0, arr.length - 1, dp); } private int minRemovals(int[] arr, int i, int j, int[][] dp) { if (i > j) return 0; if (i == j) return 1; if (dp[i][j] != -1) return dp[i][j]; int temp = minRemovals(arr, i + 1, j, dp) + 1; for (int k = i + 1; k <= j; k++) { if (arr[i] == arr[k]) temp = Math.min(temp, minRemovals(arr, i + 1, k - 1, dp) + minRemovals(arr, k + 1, j, dp)); } return dp[i][j] = temp; } }

import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Map; import java.util.PriorityQueue; public class Solution { public int minSetSize(int[] arr) { Map freq_map = new HashMap<>(); PriorityQueue max_heap = new PriorityQueue<>((a, b) -> b - a); for (int x : arr) freq_map.put(x, freq_map.getOrDefault(x, 0) + 1); for (int cnt : freq_map.values()) max_heap.offer(cnt); int half = arr.length / 2; int size = 0; while (size < half) { size += max_heap.poll(); } return max_heap.size() + 1; // Adjusted to account for the last element added } }

public class Solution { int[] dx = {-1, 1, 0, 0}; int[] dy = {0, 0, -1, 1}; void dfs(int[][] grid, int x, int y) { if (x < 0 || x >= grid.length || y < 0 || y >= grid[0].length || grid[x][y] != 0) return; grid[x][y] = 1; for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) { dfs(grid, x + dx[i], y + dy[i]); } } public int closedIsland(int[][] grid) { if (grid == null || grid.length <= 2 || grid[0].length <= 2) return 0; for (int i = 0; i < grid.length; i++) { dfs(grid, i, 0); dfs(grid, i, grid[0].length - 1); } for (int j = 1; j < grid[0].length - 1; j++) { dfs(grid, 0, j); dfs(grid, grid.length - 1, j); } int res = 0; for (int i = 1; i < grid.length - 1; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < grid[0].length - 1; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == 0) { dfs(grid, i, j); res++; } } } return res; } }

public class Solution { public String stoneGameIII(int[] stoneValue) { int n = stoneValue.length; int dp[] = new int[n + 1]; dp[n] = 0; for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) { dp[i] = Integer.MIN_VALUE; int curr = 0; for (int j = 0; j < 3 && i + j < n; ++j) { curr += stoneValue[i + j]; dp[i] = Math.max(dp[i], curr - dp[i + j + 1]); } } return dp[0] == 0 ? "Tie" : dp[0] > 0 ? "Alice" : "Bob"; } }

public class Solution { public String stoneGameIII(int[] stoneValue) { int n = stoneValue.length; int dp0 = 0, dp1 = Integer.MIN_VALUE, dp2 = Integer.MIN_VALUE; for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) { int curr = 0; for (int j = 0; j < 3 && i + j < n; ++j) { curr += stoneValue[i + j]; dp2 = Math.max(dp2, curr - dp1); dp1 = dp0; dp0 = curr - dp2; } } return dp0 == 0 ? "Tie" : dp0 > 0 ? "Alice" : "Bob"; } }

public class Solution { public String stoneGameIII(int[] stoneValue) { int n = stoneValue.length; int dp[] = new int[n + 1]; for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) dp[i] = Math.max(0, Integer.MIN_VALUE); for (int j = n; j > 0 && j <= n; ++j) { int curr = 0; while (--j >= 0 && j + 3 - 1 < n) curr += stoneValue[j]; dp[i] = Math.max(dp[i], curr - dp[j + 4]); } return dp[1] == 0 ? "Tie" : dp[1] > 0 ? "Alice" : "Bob"; } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public String reformat(String s) { Queue letters = new LinkedList<>(); Queue digits = new LinkedList<>(); for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (Character.isLetter(c)) letters.add(c); else digits.add(c); } boolean isConditionMet = Math.abs(letters.size() - digits.size()) > 1; if (isConditionMet) return ""; StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder(); boolean useLetter = letters.size() > digits.size(); while (!letters.isEmpty() || !digits.isEmpty()) { if (useLetter) { result.append(letters.poll()); } else { result.append(digits.poll()); } useLetter = !useLetter; } return result.toString(); } }

import java.util.ArrayDeque; import java.util.Deque; public class Solution { public int longestSubarray(int[] nums, int limit) { Deque maxDeque = new ArrayDeque<>(); Deque minDeque = new ArrayDeque<>(); // Extracting the logic for updating max and min deque void updateDeques(Deque deque, int num) { while (!deque.isEmpty() && num > deque.peekLast()) deque.pollLast(); while (!deque.isEmpty() && num < deque.peekLast()) deque.pollLast(); deque.offerLast(num); } // Extracting the logic for checking and updating window size void checkAndUpdateWindow(int left, int right) { if (maxDeque.peekFirst() - minDeque.peekFirst() > limit) { if (nums[left] == maxDeque.peekFirst()) maxDeque.pollFirst(); if (nums[left] == minDeque.peekFirst()) minDeque.pollFirst(); left++; } } int longest = 0; for (int right = 0; right < nums.length; right++) { updateDeques(maxDeque, nums[right]); updateDeques(minDeque, nums[right]); checkAndUpdateWindow(left, right); longest = Math.max(longest, right - left + 1); } return longest; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.ArrayList; public class Solution { public List checkIfPrerequisite(int numCourses, int[][] prerequisites, int[][] queries) { boolean[][] adj_matrix = new boolean[numCourses][numCourses]; for (int[] pre : prerequisites) { adj_matrix[pre[0]][pre[1]] = true; } for (int k = 0; k < numCourses; k++) { for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) { if(adj_matrix[i][k] && adj_matrix[k][i]) continue; for (int j = 0; j < numCourses; j++) { adj_matrix[i][j] = adj_matrix[i][j] || (adj_matrix[i][k] && adj_matrix[k][j]); } } } List answer = new ArrayList<>(); for (int[] query : queries) { answer.add(adj_matrix[query[0]][query[1]]); } return answer; } } The duplicate conditional branches have been combined into a single check using the `continue` statement to skip unnecessary iterations.

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findLeastNumOfUniqueInts(int[] arr, int k) { Map count = new HashMap<>(); for (int n : arr) { count.put(n, count.getOrDefault(n, 0) + 1); } PriorityQueue pq = new PriorityQueue<>((a, b) -> a[1] - b[1]); for (Map.Entry entry : count.entrySet()) { pq.add(new int[]{entry.getKey(), entry.getValue()}); } while (k > 0 && !pq.isEmpty() && k >= pq.peek()[1]) { k -= pq.poll()[1]; } return k == 0 ? pq.size() : pq.size() + 1; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findLeastNumOfUniqueInts(int[] arr, int k) { Map count = new HashMap<>(); for (int n : arr) { count.put(n, count.getOrDefault(n, 0) + 1); } PriorityQueue pq = new PriorityQueue<>((a, b) -> a[1] - b[1]); for (Map.Entry entry : count.entrySet()) { pq.add(new int[]{entry.getKey(), entry.getValue()}); } while (k > 0 && !pq.isEmpty()) { k -= pq.poll()[1]; } return k == 0 ? pq.size() : pq.size() + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int maxNonOverlapping(int[] nums, int target) { Map prefixSum = new HashMap<>(); prefixSum.put(0, 1); return Arrays.stream(nums) .mapToObj(num -> sum + num) .collect(Collectors.groupingByInt( e -> e, Collectors.collectingAndThen( Collectors.filtering(e -> e == target), v -> (int) Math.min(v.size(), 1) ) )) .sum(); } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean isEvenOddTree(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return false; Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.offer(root); int level = 0; while (!queue.isEmpty()) { int size = queue.size(); int prevVal = (level % 2 == 0) ? 0 : 1000001; for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) { TreeNode curr = queue.poll(); if ((level % 2 == 0 && (curr.val % 2 == 0 || curr.val <= prevVal)) || (level % 2 != 0 && (curr.val % 2 != 0 || curr.val >= prevVal))) { return false; } prevVal = curr.val; if (curr.left != null) queue.offer(curr.left); if (curr.right != null) queue.offer(curr.right); } level++; } return true; } }

public class Solution { int longestAwesomeSubstring(String s) { int n = s.length(); int maxLen = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { int odd_count = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (int j = i; j <= n; ++j) { char c = s.charAt(j); if (++freq[c - 'a'] % 2 == 1) { odd_count++; } else { odd_count--; } maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, j - i + (odd_count == 0)); } } return maxLen; } boolean isAwesome(String s) { int odd_count = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (++freq[c - 'a'] % 2 == 1) { odd_count++; } else { odd_count--; } } return (odd_count <= 1); } }
